docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY ECHEVERIA, BYRON AS TO DEFENDANT MEXICO EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-05-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEXICO EXPRESS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ECHEVERIA, BYRON

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ECHEVERIA, BYRON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ECHEVERIA, BYRON AS TO DEFENDANT MEXICO EXPRESS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF BYRON ECHEVERIA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MEXICO EXPRESS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SULMA ALVARADO, CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
